query: SELECT b.id, b.customerId, c.name, c.phone, b.type, b.startDate, b.endDate, b.status, b.price, b.notes, b.createdAt FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN customers c ON b.customerId = c.id ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jLhJHubTyoZ5ET.root --database ALmxfXzXdGwygXSTLhzNJo --execute SELECT b.id, b.customerId, c.name, c.phone, b.type, b.startDate, b.endDate, b.status, b.price, b.notes, b.createdAt FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN customers c ON b.customerId = c.id ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
